title: products
description: Catalog entries. Every product is top-level (parent_system_type is deprecated and ignored). `product_type` distinguishes fences from gates from other catalog items. Gate products list which fence system_types they pair with via `compatible_with_system_types`.

system_type.description: Unique (within org) key for this product. Uppercase, underscore-separated. Examples: 'QSHS', 'QS_GATE', 'VS', 'XPL', 'BAYG', 'GATE'.

product_type.description: 'fence' for sellable fencing systems; 'gate' for gate products; 'other' for inactive/future catalog families (balustrade, colorbond, glass, etc.).

compatible_with_system_types.description: For gate products, list of fence system_types this gate pairs with. Ignored for non-gate products. Example: ['QSHS', 'VS', 'XPL', 'BAYG'].

parent_system_type.description: DEPRECATED. Pre-flatten variant parent. Always null for new rows; kept optional to tolerate legacy dumps.

metadata.description: Free-form product metadata (product_family, layout hints, options list, etc). Keys are not enforced.
